falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong reversal from the bottom pattern, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear bullish momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% of the 30-day average volume on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would signal a blowoff top or extreme market participation, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and proving the current pattern match is incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly refuting the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and the 82% similarity to a bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
